title: coelachyrum poiflorum
intro: Coelachyrum poiflorum, also known as the Poiphyllum or Poiflorum plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Coelachyrum poiflorum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
